person.name: Lex Ferguson
person.description: My name is Lex Ferguson, a design engineer working across web, mobile, branding, and UI/UX. I design and build products that balance clarity, responsiveness, and personality, with experience spanning shipped club software, app concepts, identity systems, and visual design.

routes.title: Lex Ferguson | Design Engineer, Product & UI/UX
routes.description: Portfolio of Lex Ferguson, a design engineer working across web, mobile, branding, UI/UX, and visual systems.

routes.title: About | Lex Ferguson
routes.description: My name is Lex Ferguson, a design engineer working across web, mobile, branding, and UI/UX. I design and build products that balance clarity, responsiveness, and personality, with experience spanning shipped club software, app concepts, identity systems, and visual design.

routes.title: Resume | Lex Ferguson
routes.description: Resume and experience overview for Lex Ferguson across design engineering, product, branding, and digital work.

routes.title: PGC Website | Lex Ferguson
routes.description: A golf club website redesign built to clarify membership, modernize the brand, and improve responsiveness.

routes.title: Overtone App | Lex Ferguson
routes.description: A mobile-first drum tuner web app that pairs live tuning feedback with a cleaner interface.

routes.title: Verity Protect | Lex Ferguson
routes.description: A call-screening app that hard-blocks fraud, lets trusted contacts through, and protects loved ones.

routes.title: Octone Ink | Lex Ferguson
routes.description: A class project for a made-up ink company, built through branding, packaging, and core brand essentials.

routes.title: Wicked Works | Lex Ferguson
routes.description: A streetwear storefront built to sell products cleanly and support future content growth.

routes.title: Dominos App Redesign | Lex Ferguson
routes.description: A mobile ordering redesign that cuts friction, simplifies checkout, and replaces a hectic app flow.

routes.title: GridLead | Lex Ferguson
routes.description: A lead-finding platform that helps web designers discover prospects and move into outreach faster.

routes.title: PGC App | Lex Ferguson
routes.description: A golf club app for members and staff covering tee times, events, food ordering, and course updates.

routes.title: Halfway Construction | Lex Ferguson
routes.description: A satirical construction brand built through identity, motion, packaging, and landing-page concepts.

routes.title: Velkro Type Creation | Lex Ferguson
routes.description: A modular typeface created for class and applied across a poster and editorial book layout.

routes.title: Tempo | Lex Ferguson
routes.description: An AI golf companion concept with shot planning, AR guidance, and on-course insight in one mobile UX.

routes.title: Adelle Font Study | Lex Ferguson
routes.description: A typography class study of Adelle through black-and-white and color editorial layouts.

routes.title: Stop Motion Color Project | Lex Ferguson
routes.description: Two frame-by-frame class animations exploring motion, timing, and color through simple forms.

routes.title: City Scapes | Lex Ferguson
routes.description: A Tokyo-inspired identity and wayfinding project built through badges, UI, banners, and postcards.

routes.title: Neon Photography | Lex Ferguson
routes.description: A digital photography series using real neon tubes and glass reflections to create depth and nostalgia.

routes.title: Room Illustration | Lex Ferguson
routes.description: A vector illustration of Rechnitz Hall focused on proportion, gradients, and spatial depth.

routes.title: Sunscape Poster | Lex Ferguson
routes.description: A class poster concept balancing expressive type with a more minimal composition and color system.

routes.title: Currency Redesign | Lex Ferguson
routes.description: A Fender-themed redesign of U.S. currency built as a full bill set with music-inspired details.

routes.title: Self Branding | Lex Ferguson
routes.description: A personal identity system built around a custom monogram and an eight-point layout structure.

routes.title: Space Themed App Widgets | Lex Ferguson
routes.description: A space-themed widget and icon system designed for small-screen clarity and reusable UI components.

routes.title: Minimalist Poster | Lex Ferguson
routes.description: A minimalist poster for Whiplash built with flat shapes, reduced color, and a restrained print feel.

routes.title: Charcole | Lex Ferguson
routes.description: Selected drawing-class works in charcoal and sanguine, from figure studies to portraits and still life.

routes.title: Color Collages | Lex Ferguson
routes.description: Three space-themed digital collages built from scanned media and composed to tell a visual story.

routes.title: Replica Collages | Lex Ferguson
routes.description: A three-part collage series about chasing the idea of something better and losing the present.

routes.title: Squisito | Lex Ferguson
routes.description: A full Figma prototype for an Italian food app built as a college class project.

routes.title: Tracker App | Lex Ferguson
routes.description: My first real UI project, a dark-mode productivity concept for tasks, reminders, and planning.

routes.title: SageAIO | Lex Ferguson
routes.description: A COVID-era startup I built around retail automation, restock tracking, and fast product turnaround.

experience.summary: Own the club's web and mobile product stack used by roughly 300 members and 10 staff.
Volunteer golf instructor helping older adults build confidence and enjoyment through patient coaching.
Produce jewelry photography, retouching, and editorial layout assets for brand and magazine work.
Maintain the club website while supporting day-to-day member communication and golf shop operations.
Founded a COVID-era retail automation startup spanning product, engineering, design, and growth.
Studying design and animation with a focus on visual systems, motion, and digital product work.
